Animal embryo experimentation

in the U.S., by species

Most studies involve cattle and pigs,

which are gene−edited most

commonly with CRISPR

technology.

Sheep

Pig

Channel catfish

Duck

Cattle

1

Cattle (6)

1

6

1

Quail (2)

Goat (2)

Pig (5)

Cattle (2)

Nile tilapia (4)

Channel

catfish (4)

20

10

Data sourced from ISAAA —

all CRISPR and TALEN-edited

animals from 2011-2023.
